chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. Nos.114 to 117 & 171 of 2017 Date Order with Signature of Judge Hearing Case (Priority) 1. For order on office objections a/w reply at A. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For hearing of CMA No.507/2017 20.02.2026 Mr. Imtiaz Advocate, holding brief for Dr. Shah Nawaz, Advocate for the appellants. Mr. Sundar Lal Advocate, holding brief for Mr. Ameen M. Bandukda, Advocate for respondent No.1 in HCA No.114 of 2017. Ms. Masooda Siraj, Advocate for respondents No.2 and 3 in HCA No.114 of 2017. Mr. Mazhar Imtiaz Lari, Advocate for respondent No.1 in HCA Nos.116 and 171 of 2017. Ms. Mona Mehfooz, Collector of Customs Appraisement, Karachi, West. Per learned counsel similar matters have been decided by this Court vide order dated 13.02.2026 passed in HCA No.03 of 2019. Learned counsel states that in mutatis mutandis application of reasons mentioned therein, the present HCAs may be dismissed as withdrawn. Order accordingly. Office to place a copy hereof in each connected HCA. JUDGE JUDGE Asif
